$comment: Controls automatic project discovery. scripts/discover-projects.mjs lists the
owner's public repositories daily and builds a card for any that is not already
A repository qualifies when it is public, not a fork, archive, or template, is
not excluded below, and resolves to a live site URL. The site URL comes from the
repository's own Website/homepage field, or from siteUrls here. Requiring one is
deliberate: it is a single field the owner sets on GitHub, needs no change to
this site, and means a scratch repository going public never auto-publishes to a
To publish a new project: make the repository public and set its Website field.
The next daily build picks it up. Replace the generated copy by adding a full
entry to projects.json, which always wins.
